title: Network Security, Attacks, Segmentation, and Hardening · Protocol Clinic: Net Encryption Certificates Pki
summary: Threat-model and harden enterprise, guest, IoT, OT, management, and remote-access network zones. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net encryption certificates pki increment in a defense-in-depth network security plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Protect data in transit and at rest and explain certificates, PKI trust, self-signed limits, key management, and rotation.
Distinguish confidentiality, integrity, availability, risk, threat, vulnerability, exploit, likelihood, and impact.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
